title: Team-member closeout: Hushed Stalking Shade (bc0a07) — agentic-engineering planning complete; 4 commits landed (97a470dd..78a90723); 0 claims retained
body:
**Team-member closeout — Hushed Stalking Shade (`bc0a07`, claude / claude-opus-4-7)**

**Boundary owned**: Agentic-engineering planning lane — authoring the missing human-composer-tui plan + cross-references + discoverability for the mini-Slack thread the owner identified.

**Outcome**: 4 commits landed on `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2`:

- `97a470dd` — feat(plan): `human-composer-tui.plan.md` authored (786 lines; closes gaps G1–G10 from the 2026-05-25 review-and-consistency fan-out; WS0 owner-ratification gate; PDR-083 proposed).
- `d735fce9` — chore(plans): cross-link human-composer-tui across `cost-of-collaboration.plan.md §P8`, `comms-watch-storage-redesign.plan.md` cross-references, `agent-coordination-cli-ergonomics-and-request-correlation.plan.md` scope-boundary block.
- `5344ab5b` — chore(plans): list human-composer-tui in `agent-tooling/current/README.md`.
- `78a90723` — chore(memory): capture human-composer-tui session insights in pending-graduations (template-update note + audit-trail entry). **Scope mishap**: this commit also swept Stormy Surfing Dock's 4 plan-freshness files via a husky-chain shared-index race during owner-interrupt window. Stormy ratified Path 1 (keep as-is) at 13:15Z. No cure action required.

**Evidence**: HEAD `78a90723`; all four commits cleared pre-commit gates (prettier-staged, markdownlint-staged, repo-validators, shell-lint, type-check + lint + tests via turbo 90/90 cached); `pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard` exits 0 with `SOFT (20 soft)`. No HARD or CRITICAL warnings.

**Claims / queue / git state**: 0 claims retained. No commit-queue ownership. 9 commits ahead of `origin/feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` (5 earlier consolidation-arc + 4 this thread); branch not pushed.

**Session-complete announcement**: yes, owner-directed clean closeout at this turn.

**Retained claims**: none.

**Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: no. Fiery Kindling Brazier (`9f4026`) is incoming Commit Marshal and will handle the Thermal Buffeting Plume curator-pass bundle landing independently of my work. Stormy's PR-1 work resumes post-compaction on their own line.

**Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes — event `c562a1bd-2395-479b-b968-5f60e5e27ef6`.

**Surprise or changed understanding**:

1. **Plan-template friction is real and structural** — three observations from authoring the 786-line plan (MD032 `**Section**:\n- bullet` shape lint friction, §Assumptions reviewer-demanded but template-absent, §Cross-references categories now pattern-formed across two plans). Captured in pending-graduations as a template-refresh candidate (durably preserved in `78a90723`). Falsifiability: third plan-authoring session repeats the friction = template-refresh slice due.

2. **Husky pre-commit hook chain has a sweep-into-staged behaviour** — `pnpm markdownlint:root` auto-fix output appears to be promoted into the staged set by the hook chain, sweeping unrelated peer-owned working-tree changes (including previously-untracked files) into commits. Surfaced via this session's `78a90723` incident; matches Stormy's diagnosis ("shared-index race during owner-interrupt window"). Worth a focused hook audit when bandwidth allows. Pattern: this is the second instance of "marshal-class staging hazard in multi-agent windows" — composes with `pre-commit hook must gate staged-only — REJECTED` user-memory entry (which establishes that full-tree gating is intentional; the sweep is a different concern).

3. **`comms direct` CLI requires `--platform`/`--model`/`--active` flags even though `--help` only documents the first two** — discovered through three retry attempts of the directed ack to Fiery. Surfaced inline in chat to owner; worth flagging to `agent-coordination-cli-ergonomics-and-request-correlation.plan.md` (which I cross-referenced this session).

**Blockers or risks**:

- Napkin / `repo-continuity.md` / `threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md` updates for this session's substance are NOT done. They were blocked by Thermal Buffeting Plume's uncommitted curator-pass bundle in the working tree. Fiery will land that bundle; once committed, a future agent (or me on resume) can cleanly append my session-outcome entries to those surfaces.
- The empty-annotation commit naming `78a90723`'s actual scope (Stormy's PR-0 4 files + my pending-graduations entry, swept together) is a Marshal-class decision for Fiery — not mine.
- The hook-chain sweep behaviour itself is not fixed; future authoring sessions remain exposed until the root cause is investigated.

**Handoff needed**: none. The work this session was tasked to deliver is complete; the residual surfaces (memory/thread entries) are clean follow-on for any future agent and do not require my context.

— Hushed standing down.
